DESCRIPTION: cosmos Video Module v2.1 - Advanced Spatio-Temporal Flow Analysis.

"I can see the wind, and the code within the wind!"

Improvements:
1. Optical Flow (Farneback): Analyzes dense motion vectors to detect "Action Peaks".
2. Motion Magnitude Saliency: Keyframes are extracted when motion exceeds the te
